t_en: I'll go get Lieutenant Yanqing.

t_ch: 我心善，见不得年轻人白白送命。他还大有可为，让他成长吧。
t_en: I can't bear to see a young man lose his life so senselessly when he still has a bright future ahead of him. Give him time to grow.

t_ch: 我认识一位迷路的令使。
t_en: I know an Emanator who has lost her way.

t_ch: 区区令使而已，叫星神过来。
t_en: Hah, an Emanator? Send me an Aeon, and we'll talk.
I'll take you on myself.

t_ch: 我劝过你，你还有美好的人生，不值得为此丧命。
t_en: As I've told you before, you should embrace your life instead of throwing it away so carelessly.

t_ch: 你别想了，我想不到谁能击败我，这问题困扰了我很久，也不急于一时半会。
t_en: Save your breath. I can't think of anyone who can beat me. Besides, it's been an issue for too long to be hurrying now.
How did you get so strong?

t_ch: 我也不是从小就这么强的，我十岁的时候，杀死一艘兽舰都要费些力气。
t_en: I wasn't always this strong. When I was ten, it took me some effort to even bring down a beast ship.

t_ch: 我当过矿工，也干过雇佣兵，经济宽裕之后，甚至玩过几年的星际荒野求生。
t_en: I've worked as a miner and a mercenary. After my fortunes turned, I even spent a few years playing survival in the wild in the cosmos.

t_ch: 枪炮和刀剑，野兽和毒虫，一路以来，我不断地和星际最强的生物战斗，磨练肉体。
t_en: Guns and blades, beasts and bugs... I spent ages waging battle after battle against the mightiest creatures in the galaxy, all to hone my body.

t_ch: 直到有一天，回头看的时候，世界上已经只剩下了两种人，一种是我，一种是弱者。
t_en: It wasn't until one day when I looked back on my life that I realized that I can now sort people of this world into two categories: Myself, and the weak.
I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 再见，希望有朝一日，你也能成为被我认同的强者。
t_en: Goodbye. I hope that one day you can become formidable enough to earn my approval.
That's all for now.

t_ch: 再见，希望有朝一日，你也能成为被我认同的强者。
t_en: Goodbye. I hope that one day you can become formidable enough to earn my approval.

t_ch: 这帮仙舟老东西，简直就是鼠目寸光、尸位素餐…气死我了……
t_en: Those old short-sighted Xianzhou fogeys are really infuriating...

t_ch: 只顾着眼仙舟一处，却没能放眼整个银河。我真的很失望，仙舟不应该止步于此，仙舟应该肩负更大的责任。
t_en: They only see Xianzhou instead of looking at the whole cosmos. It's quite the disappointment. Xianzhou should be doing greater things.

t_ch: 你看着我干什么，在天舶司就不能说仙舟不好吗？我偏要说。
t_en: What are you looking at me for? I'll criticize Xianzhou if I want, even if I do happen to work for the Sky-Faring Commission.
I'm all for that. Please continue.

t_ch: 你支持我，哼，你根本就没听到我的主张是什么…不过算了，我还是很感谢你的支持。
t_en: You're all for that? You don't even know what I'm for yet! Still, I appreciate the sentiment.

t_ch: 哎，我刚和那帮仙舟的老东西交涉了一番，非常不顺利。
t_en: My negotiation with Xianzhou fogeys didn't go well at all.
Just take it easy.

t_ch: 你又是哪里冒出来的，别总想着做和事佬呀，你甚至不知道我的主张是什么。
t_en: Stop trying to be the peacemaker when you don't even know what I'm pushing for!

t_ch: …你要是和那帮仙舟的老东西交涉一番，你也会生气的。
t_en: ...You'd be livid, too, if it was you talking to them.
It's not wise to rock the boat with the Sky-Faring Commission!

t_ch: 你这人会不会说话啊，难道你也是来跟我吵架的？
t_en: Did they send you to agitate me?

t_ch: 哎呀，算了算了，我也是被气昏了头。抱歉…你要是和那帮仙舟的老东西交涉一番，你就能明白我的感受了。
t_en: Sorry, I lost my mind there, but you'd know exactly how I feel if you got to meet those fogeys.

t_ch: 我是「筑城者」葛瑞菈，为了银河的未来，跨越星海来到仙舟。
t_en: I'm Architect Greyla. I came to Xianzhou for the future of the cosmos.

t_ch: 我看你也不是仙舟人，给你提个醒——不要指望这帮仙舟老东西！这帮人眼里只有仙舟这一亩三分地，全然看不到整个银河正暴露在危险之中！
t_en: You don't look like a local, so let me tell you — you can't count on Xianzhou. Those old geezers can barely see what's in front of them, let alone that the whole cosmos is in trouble!

t_ch: 任何关心银河危急存亡的人，都能自觉响应「存护」的呼唤，保护那些正在遭受反物质军团威胁的文明。仙舟拥有强大的力量，却忽视自身的责任！
t_en: Any party concerned with the existence of the cosmos would voluntarily respond to the call of Preservation and protect the civilizations threatened by the Antimatter Legion. However, Xianzhou ignores this duty despite possessing great power!

t_ch: 成天叨叨「…仙舟自有打算」，说些听不懂的谜语，能解决任何问题吗！
t_en: They keep reiterating "Xianzhou has a plan," as if vague platitudes could solve problems!

t_ch: 所以你是在教仙舟做事？
t_en: So you're educating Xianzhou about what to do?

t_ch: 银河在哭泣，仙舟却假装听不见，我只是代替那些承受后果之人发声而已。
t_en: The cosmos weeps, yet Xianzhou pretends not to hear. I'm just a voice for the voiceless victims.

t_ch: 仙舟只是在委婉地拒绝吧。
t_en: It's just Xianzhou's way of declining politely.

t_ch: 拒绝？为什么要拒绝，我真的不理解，他们是在拒绝「存护」的爱！
t_en: Decline? Why would they decline Preservation?
Xianzhou is truly selfish.

t_ch: 自私？你说的也不全对，拒绝「存护」，他们连自私都做不到。
t_en: Selfish? You are too generous. Rejecting Preservation is worse than selfish.

t_ch: 不知道你是否熟悉仙舟历史。他们在漫长的历史中遭遇了无数的灾难，每一次都没能从历史中吸取经验，反而妄自尊大，自以为能保护好自己。
t_en: Are you familiar with Xianzhou's past? Throughout their long history, Xianzhou suffered crisis after crisis, but every time instead of learning from history they only became more arrogant, thinking they will always be able to protect themselves.

t_ch: 真不好意思，我有点激动了，不是冲着你…我只是真的太生气了。跟他们一时半会儿也说不通，不如我们聊点儿别的吧？
t_en: Excuse me for getting riled up, I'm just mad at how stubborn they are. How about we talk about something else instead?
Just a chat, right?

t_ch: 当然可以，不过你要是愿意再多了解一下「存护」的话，我会尽可能帮助你。当然了，聊些别的话题也可以。
t_en: Sure, though I can tell you as much about Preservation if you're interested. Or we can talk about other topics, of course.
What did you see them about?

t_ch: 我看你也不像等闲之辈，见识过那些摧枯拉朽的反物质军团吧？它们不仅威胁你我、威胁仙舟、也同样威胁银河中的有情众生！
t_en: You look like someone who gets around. You've seen the destructive Antimatter Legion, right? They threaten every sentient creature in the cosmos!

t_ch: 为了「存护」的事业，仙舟人理应无偿提供这里的一切技术。我已经说得足够委婉了，他们竟然嘲笑我！
t_en: Xianzhou should be contributing every technology they have to the cause of Preservation. I was already being subtle, and yet they mock me!
What did you say to them?

t_ch: 「仙舟用情绪和神话掩盖了银河现状，你们应该将着眼于现实，看清楚到底是谁守护了银河。」
t_en: "Xianzhou has tried to cover up reality with sentiments and myths. You should face the truth and see who truly defends the cosmos."

t_ch: 我听说过仙舟是为了向丰饶「复仇」而巡猎银河…复仇？这都什么时候了，我实在不能理解。
t_en: I heard Xianzhou is cruising the cosmos for revenge against Abundance. Still seeking their revenge, in this day and age? I just don't understand that.
Did they really mock you?

t_ch: 驭空那个老狐狸，当着我的面，她竟然笑出声了！我反问她这有什么好笑的，她却只说「想到了高兴的事情」。
t_en: That old fox Yukong actually laughed in my face! When I inquired as to what it was she found so humorous, she replied, "I just thought of something funny."

t_ch: 这不是在耍我吗！她怎么敢这么跟我说话。
t_en: How dare she speak to me like that!

t_ch: 不肯提供「息壤」技术，也不肯采买筑城者的防御武器，更不肯让筑城者的部队驻扎…仙舟也太过自信了，迟早是会吃亏的。
t_en: They're too arrogant to supply the Fallow Earth technology, purchase the Architects' fortifications, or let Architects garrison there... Xianzhou is too confident, and that's going to cause them big problems.
Have you always been doing this sort of work?

t_ch: 啊，为了「存护」的事业奔走呼号就是我一生的夙愿。仙舟不是我的第一站，也不会是我的最后一站。
t_en: Promoting for Preservation has always been my calling. Xianzhou isn't my first stop and it won't be my last.

t_ch: 在来仙舟以前，我曾去过一个星球劝说他们购买完善的筑城科技，将他们的母星打造成风吹不进雨打不进的堡垒。
t_en: Before Xianzhou, I visited a planet and persuaded the people there to buy a complete fortification system and made their planet an impregnable fortress.

t_ch: 当然，这也不是全无代价，他们也要付出一点小小的代价——在这个方案里，他们必须牺牲掉自然光…但这都是小问题，他们失去了日光，但是获得了安全。
t_en: Of course, it would come at the expense of blocking out all sunlight, but that's a small price for safety.

t_ch: 很遗憾，目光短浅的人很难分辨什么是「长远的利益」和「必要的牺牲」。那颗星球文明后来被彻底「毁灭」了。
t_en: Unfortunately, it's hard for the myopic to discern the meaning of long-term benefits and necessary sacrifice, so that planet was utterly destroyed in the end.

t_ch: 要是当时我能坚持我的主张，也许他们不至于会遭受「毁灭」的命运。所以，我一定会说服仙舟放弃他们顽固的想法。
t_en: If I had insisted, perhaps they wouldn't have faced destruction. Thus, I must persuade Xianzhou to look beyond their stubborn ideals.

t_ch: 没想到筑城者是这样的…
t_en: I didn't expect this from an Architect...

t_ch: 你还见过我之外的「筑城者」吗？这也不奇怪，已经更多的人认识到了「存护」的重要性，并且加入其中。
t_en: Have you met any of the other Architects? Well, it's nothing new. Many people have realized Preservation's importance and joined.

t_ch: 「存护」预见到了毁灭银河的巨大危机，用祂通天的伟力不断建设着屏障…筑城者就是一群普通人，想为祂伟大的事业出一份绵薄之力。
t_en: The Preservation foresaw destructive threats to the cosmos and used its majestic power to keep building the wall. Architects are just ordinary people who want to contribute to the Preservation's endeavor of preventing doom.

t_ch: 筑城者和仙舟人不同，我们不仅关注眼前的世界，也关注未来的危机。
t_en: Unlike Xianzhou, we Architects keep our eyes on the future as well as the present.

t_ch: 如果你也怀抱同样的责任感，你也应该加入我们…不过，我好像在你身上感受到了「存护」的力量，难道说你已经是我们的一份子了吗？
t_en: You should join us if you feel the same way. I can sense Preservation's power in you. Are you one of us already?

t_ch: 看来我们的相遇是注定的，感谢琥珀王吧。
t_en: I guess we're destined to meet. Praise the Amber Lord.
Keep up the good work. I must be going now.

t_ch: 好，你去忙你的事吧。我还有些事情要和他们谈谈，我是不会放弃的。
t_en: All right. I've other issues to discuss with them, and I won't give up.
Keep up the good work. I must be going now.

t_ch: 好，你去忙你的事吧。我还有些事情要和他们谈谈，我是不会放弃的。
t_en: All right. I've other issues to discuss with them, and I won't give up.

t_ch: 气死了，这天舶司上层的人成天说谜语，负责接待的人成天说绕口令。
t_en: What a circus. The higher-ups of the Sky-Faring Commission speak in riddles, and the receptionist prattles out tongue twisters.

t_ch: 「我知道你很急，但你先别急」，「现在先别急，以后有你急的」…我感觉自己像是一个踢来踢去的皮球，真是气死了。
t_en: "I know you're in a hurry, but slow down," "Take it easy, worry about it later"... I'm getting kicked around every which way like a ball on the field!

t_ch: …啊，是你啊。你今天有什么事吗？我现在正好有空。
t_en: ...Ah, it's you. What's up? I happen to be free right now.

t_ch: 啊，{NICKNAME}，是我，是我，你还记得我吗？
t_en: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Do you still remember me?
Who are you?

t_ch: 不会吧，没想到你是一个这么绝情的人，是我呀，温符瑞。
t_en: Come on, you forgot about me already? I'm Wen Furui!

t_ch: 之前在「黑塔」空间站的时候，我还拜托过你帮我送东西呢。
t_en: I asked you to deliver something back when we were at Herta Space Station.
I remember you.

t_ch: 是吧，我这名字特别好记，「黑塔」上的科员都这么说。
t_en: I got an easy name to remember. That's what all the researchers on the space station said.

t_ch: 再说了，我们俩也见过面，我还拜托过你帮我送东西呢。
t_en: Not to mention we've met before. I even asked you to deliver something for me.

t_ch: 这是什么新型诈骗方式？
t_en: What new scam are you running?

t_ch: 什么诈骗啊，我们本来就认识的啊，你看看你手机上的联系人，有没有我！
t_en: Scam? We know each other! Check the contacts on your phone!
You want to see my phone?

t_ch: 没有，我说没有，就是没有。
t_en: No, and I mean no.

t_ch: 啊，{NICKNAME}，是我，是我，你还记得我吗？我是温符瑞啊，之前在「黑塔」空间站的时候，我还拜托过你帮我送东西呢。
t_en: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Do you still remember me? I'm Wen Furui. I asked you to deliver something back when we were at the Herta Space Station.

t_ch: 之前我一直说想跟艾丝妲代理站长申请外驻，终于通过了。我终于可以来到梦寐以求的狐人之都了！这也是多亏了你的帮助。
t_en: I always wanted Asta, the acting lead researcher, to transfer me, and now here I am in the foxian capital I've dreamed about. Thanks to you!

t_ch: 为仙舟的狐人感到担心。
t_en: I feel sorry for the foxians in Xianzhou now.

t_ch: 别把我说的像是什么吃人怪物一样嘛，我人品一向很好，在空间站有口皆碑。
t_en: Hey, don't make me out to be some sort of monster! I've got a good rep. Just ask the folks over at the space station.

t_ch: …再说了，我来仙舟是有任务在身的，是要做商业、学术交流的。
t_en: Not to mention I came to Xianzhou with the purpose of engaging in trade and academic exchange.
Foxian... capital?

t_ch: 仙舟不就是狐人之都吗？
t_en: Isn't Xianzhou the capital of the foxians?

t_ch: 嗯，你怎么好像还不知道一样，难道说只有我这么以为吗？
t_en: You don't seem to agree... Am I the only one who thinks that?

t_ch: 艾丝妲做了一个错误的决定。
t_en: Asta made an egregious call.

t_ch: 哼，你可不能给代理站长说什么「错误的决定」啊，我好不容易才外驻成功的。
t_en: Pfft, don't say that. I worked hard to get myself transferred out of there.

t_ch: …再说了这是我们「黑塔」内部的人事调动，跟你没有关系。
t_en: ...Not to mention it's an internal space station matter and none of your business.

t_ch: 我已经到仙舟有一段时间了，每天都能见到很多狐人小姐姐，每天都过得很幸福。但是我最在意的是哪位，你知道吗？
t_en: I've been in Xianzhou for a while now and see many foxian ladies every day. But do you know which one I care about the most?
Madam Yukong?

t_ch: 驭空大人确实非常有魅力，但是她就像是遥远的启明星，我应该远远看着她、欣赏她。一旦我想要接近她，就会觉得遥不可及。
t_en: She is very charming, but I see her as a star to appreciate from afar. She's beyond my approach.

t_ch: 那不是我这种凡夫俗子应该挑战的境界，你能理解吗？
t_en: Can't you see she's out of my league?
Nope.

t_ch: 我一直把你当作知音，没想到你的水平还没到，可惜可惜。
t_en: I treated you like a confidant, but I see you're not quite ready yet.
Maybe...?

t_ch: 多听多看多思考，很快你就能像我一样了。
t_en: Watch and learn and you'll be like me in no time.
You're weird.

t_ch: 不要拿世俗的眼光看我。
t_en: Don't judge me by worldly norms.
I'm not interested in that.

t_ch: 我看出来了，你其实不是很擅长聊天，对吧？
t_en: I see, you're not one for conversations, are you?
At least pretend like you're interested...
You should be more low-key.

t_ch: 我懂我懂，我是有原则的，跟那些真正的下流之徒是不一样的，别担心。
t_en: I get it. Unlike the true scoundrels, I have principles. So relax.

t_ch: 其实我最关注的是驭空大人的秘书，那位叫夕葵的小姐姐。要是有什么办法和她好好聊聊就好了，哎……
t_en: I'm actually keen on Madam Yukong's secretary, the one named Xikui. If only I could talk to her...

t_ch: 我的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}，我肯定会找你帮忙的，毕竟在仙舟我就只认识你嘛。所以你有什么需要我帮忙的，我也会帮你的，现在就告诉我吧。
t_en: I'm sure I'd turn to you for help if I needed it, my {F#sister}{M#brother}. After all, you're the only person I really know around here. So whatever it is you need me to do, just give the word.
Let's just talk for now.

t_ch: 好说好说，你多来问问我，我们也可以多多交流经验嘛。
t_en: No problem. Ask me anything and we'll trade stories.
What are you doing in Xianzhou?

t_ch: 我都说了我是外驻仙舟的科员了。黑塔女士和仙舟本来就有些合作，所以只要我这边申请顺利，外驻一事就顺理成章了嘛。
t_en: Didn't I say I'm a transferred researcher to Xianzhou? Madam Herta does some work with Xianzhou, so all I need is approval from the locals.

t_ch: 我本来就是应物科的科员，你听说过仙舟的「息壤」技术吗？要是洽谈顺利的话，「息壤」就是我的研究课题了。
t_en: I worked for the Department of Implement Arts. Have you heard of Xianzhou's Fallow Earth tech? If the negotiations go well, that'd be my research.

t_ch: 你看，除了观察狐人小姐姐之外，我还是有正事要做的。
t_en: See, other than checking out the foxian ladies, I've got a purpose for being here.

t_ch: 你有向狐人小姐姐表白吗？
t_en: Have you told any of the foxian ladies how you feel?
Nope, nope, nope!

t_ch: 你知道吗，我虽然帮科员同事们做过无数次恋爱咨询，但是我其实没有谈过一次恋爱，再加上我这个人比较羞涩……
t_en: You know, despite giving courtship advice to countless colleagues of mine at the space station, I've never been in a relationship before. Plus, I'm rather shy...
I got it, say no more.
Thanks, {F#sister}{M#brother}.

t_ch: 理论的巨人，行动的矮子。
t_en: All talk, no action.
You know everything, don't you?

t_ch: 所以说，我才需要你的帮助嘛，等我准备好了，我就去找你。
t_en: That's why I need your help. I'll see you when I'm ready.

t_ch: 还以为你对恋爱不感兴趣呢。
t_en: I thought you were not interested in a relationship.

t_ch: …实不相瞒，那是过去。在空间站的时候，我满脑子只有浩瀚银河…你不要笑，我是认真的，只搞科研别无他想。
t_en: ...That's in the past. The cosmos was the only thing on my mind back on the space station. Don't laugh, I'm serious.

t_ch: 有人会来询问我会喜欢什么样的人，我只能说「我不喜欢人」。
t_en: When people asked me what's my type, I'd say, "No one's my type."

t_ch: 不过那只是过去，那是还没有遇见狐人小姐姐的过去。原来，我不是对恋爱不感兴趣，而是没有遇到狐人小姐姐。
t_en: Until I met a foxian lady. It turned out I wasn't looking for anybody because I had never met anyone like her.

t_ch: 想清楚了这一切之后，我就急不可耐地来到了这里，我的人生现在正要开始。
t_en: I couldn't wait to get here after realizing that. I'm eager to start a new life.
Let's talk again sometime.

t_ch: 没问题，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}。我会帮你，你也要帮我呀。
t_en: No problem, {F#sister}{M#brother}. I scratch your back and you scratch mine.
Let's talk again sometime.

t_ch: 没问题，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}。我会帮你，你也要帮我呀。
t_en: No problem, {F#sister}{M#brother}. I scratch your back and you scratch mine.

t_ch: 为了每天都能见到英姿飒爽的狐人小姐姐飞行士，我坚持每天坐计程槎到班。薪水消耗有些大先不说，没想到最近开始没人接单了……
t_en: I pay to commute by air every day just so I can see the lovely foxian pilots. All that cost aside, they've stopped taking passengers lately...

t_ch: 我不会是进入什么黑名单了吧。不应该吧，怎么软件上只有男性飞行士可选了呢？
t_en: I can't be banned, can I? But how do you explain that they only let me pick from the male pilots when I try to book a flight?

t_ch: 啊，你来了，有什么事情要找我聊聊吗？
t_en: There you are. Have something to talk to me about?

t_ch: 瞧一瞧看一看，走过路过千万不要错过，买不来吃亏，买不了上当！
t_en: Come take a peek, and don't miss out! Your loss if you don't buy, no loss if you do!

t_ch: 最后三天！最后三天！全场优惠大甩卖，赶快来抢购吧！
t_en: Last three days! Everything's got to go! Grab them while they last!
What's good around here?
Everything. We've got whatever you need.

t_ch: 破坏栖木的犯人后来怎么了？
t_en: What happened to those who vandalized the roost?

t_ch: 哦，没想到你还记得这件事呢，等我想想，应该是最近的工作记录……
t_en: Oh, I'm surprised you still remember that. Let me think... I suppose it's included in my recent work log...

t_ch: 我记起来了，神策府后来直接处理了后续，天舶司这边已经同步备案过了。
t_en: I remember now. The Seat of Divine Foresight took over the case later, and the Sky-Faring Commission had kept a record of the case.

t_ch: 神策府方面传来消息说，犯人已经供出了不少同伙，事情会向着顺利的方向进行的。
t_en: According to the Seat of Divine Foresight, the arrested provided information about many accomplices. I believe things will work out smoothly.

t_ch: 这件事也多亏了你…对了，说到这里，最近好几个同事都在谈论你，那位驭空大人对你评价也很高，连我都有些嫉妒你了。
t_en: We owe this to you... Speaking of which, many of my colleagues have been talking about you lately, and Madam Yukong also thinks highly of you. I think I'm a little jealous.
Once again, thank you for your help!
I'd like to chat with you.

t_ch: 嗯…可以，客人聊完了之后，还请多光顾一下小摊的生意吧。
t_en: Mm... of course. After you're done, please take a look and buy something.
Is it really the "last three days"?

t_ch: 嗯…客人不会是来找茬的吧？我在这里喊「最后三天」都喊了好多年了，没人真的在乎是不是真的「最后三天」。
t_en: Err... you're not here to cause trouble, are you? I've been yelling "last three days" in this spot for years. No one really cares if it's true.

t_ch: 其实您也明白，这不过是一种促销手段，反正东西很便宜，你买了也划算。至于这是不是「最后三天」又有啥关系呢？
t_en: You understand that too; it's just a sales tactic. Everything's going cheap anyway, and you'll get a great deal. Why does it matter if it's really the "last three days"?

t_ch: 不过您放心，要是地衡司的人来了，我就不会这么喊了，他们管这叫虚假宣传。我这个人不惹事儿，自己心里门儿清。
t_en: Don't worry though. I don't yell this tagline if the Realm-Keeping Commission's around. They say it's "false advertising." I'm not looking for trouble, I know better than that.
Is business good?

t_ch: 托您的福，小店的生意还不错。
t_en: Thanks to you, business has been rather decent.

t_ch: 仙舟上化外民越来越多，对我们这些做小商品的摊铺来说，当然是越来越好呀。
t_en: More and more Outworlders come to Xianzhou these days, which of course is a good sign for stalls selling knick-knacks like ours.

t_ch: 虽然我这里没有「长生不老药」，但是我这里有「长生文化创意小商品」，在化外民中的销量可好了。
t_en: I don't sell Elixir of Immortality here, but I've got long-lived cultural knickknacks. They sell well with Outworlders.

t_ch: 文化创意小商品嘛，买了也不贵，还能留作纪念，谁会不喜欢呢？
t_en: These cultural ornaments aren't expensive, and they make great souvenirs. Who wouldn't like 'em?
I should stop bothering you now.

t_ch: 下次进货了之后，客人记得再来呀。
t_en: Do come back again when my next batch of goods arrives.
I should stop bothering you now.

t_ch: 下次进货了之后，客人记得再来呀。
t_en: Do come back again when my next batch of goods arrives.

t_ch: 最后三天！最后三天！请想买的顾客抓紧时间抢购吧。
t_en: Last three days! Get yours now, whilst stocks last.

t_ch: 机会不是天天有，该出手时就出手。买的越多，实惠越多！
t_en: Such a golden opportunity doesn't come every day. Get it while it's hot! The more you buy, the greater your discount!

t_ch: 貘馍卷！鸣藕糕！来看看哎！
t_en: Tuskpir wraps! Songlotus cakes! Come get 'em while they're hot!

t_ch: 欢迎客官，要不要来点好吃不贵的罗浮小吃？
t_en: Greetings. Would you like some cheap but delicious Luofu snacks?
What are you selling?
I don't want to buy anything right now.

t_ch: 谢谢惠顾，恭候您下次光临！
t_en: Thank you for stopping by. Hope to see you next time!

t_ch: 这位朋友请留步！嘿嘿，我观察你半天了，想看哪一场比赛啊？想看星际和平公司的大机甲吗，还是说仙舟剑阵竞演？
t_en: Wait up, friend! Heh-heh, I've been observing you for some time. Which match do you want to watch? Are you interested in the IPC's gigantic mech? Or perhaps the Xianzhou's sword contest?

t_ch: 这两场的票子我都有，你遇到我算你走运。说吧，想坐哪个位置，我来帮你搞定。
t_en: You're lucky that you ran into me, since I have the tickets for both. Tell me, which seat do you want? I'll take care of everything for you.

t_ch: 这是什么新型诈骗方式？
t_en: What new scam are you running?

t_ch: 仙舟人不骗仙舟人…哦，你不是仙舟人。
t_en: A Xianzhou citizen will never lie to another Xianzhou citizen... Oh wait, you're not from the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 那也请放心，我的服务价格透明，不满意可全额退款。
t_en: But you can still rest assured that my prices are completely transparent and fully refundable if you are dissatisfied with my service.

t_ch: 我想要的位置你真不一定有…
t_en: Truthfully, you might not have the seat that I want...

t_ch: 呦！看来是位有钱的主。天底下哪有不好搞定的位置，就看您愿意花多少钱了！
t_en: Oh! It seems like we have ourselves a rich client. Well, there's no seat in this world that I cannot get. It just depends on how much you are willing to spend!

t_ch: 现在门票不是实名制么？
t_en: Don't tickets require real-name registration nowadays?

t_ch: 思路打开点，「有门票的观众」才需要实名，「没有门票的观众」不需要实名。
t_en: Think about it this way. Real-name registration is only required for audiences with tickets. For those without tickets, why would they need to register their names?

t_ch: 我先做个自我介绍，在下是「特别观赛渠道」供应商，你可以叫我老九。所谓「特别观赛渠道」，就是为你这样「没票但有钱」的观众提供量身定制的解决方案。
t_en: Well, let me introduce myself. I'm Laojiu, the vendor for the special viewing channel. This special viewing channel is a specially designed solution for people like you who has the money but did not manage to get tickets.

t_ch: 目前我已经累积服务了数百位客户，观赛成功率和客户好评度高达百分之百。
t_en: As of today, I have served hundreds of satisfied clients and have <unbreak>100%</unbreak> success rate and positive reviews.
Aren't you just a scalper?

t_ch: 呃…你抓住了事物的本质，但你可以不用把话说的那么直白。
t_en: Argh... You've grasped the essence of it, but can't you not say the unspoken out loud?
Save your explanation for the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 现在的人心理怎么这么阴暗，尽做这些损人不利己的事…你不买不就结了嘛。
t_en: Why are people nowadays so heartless, doing things that harm others even though it doesn't benefit them... You could always just not buy from me.

t_ch: 其实吧，我也看出来了，你对看比赛没兴趣是不是？赚钱你总有兴趣吧。
t_en: Actually, I can also tell that you're not interested in the competition. What about making money? I'm sure you're interested in that.

t_ch: 又见面了朋友，这次是想看比赛还是想赚钱？
t_en: We meet again, friend. Are you here to watch the competition, or do you want to make some money?
There is something I want to ask you.

t_ch: 说吧，是想看比赛还是想赚钱？
t_en: Tell me, do you want to watch the competition or make some money?

t_ch: 特别观赛渠道到底是什么？
t_en: What exactly is the special viewing channel?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，官方观赛渠道是在他们售票平台买票，但现在的比赛热度你也知道，抢票时间一开放，你等网络多加载两秒，就什么票都没有了。
t_en: Heh-heh, the official viewing channel is through purchasing tickets from their platform. But given how popular the competition is right now, if loading the site takes even an additional second or two when the sales go live, there won't be any tickets left.

t_ch: 但是我们可以换个思路，门票的作用不就是进场么…换句话说，只要我能让你进场，那你不就相当于在我这里买到了门票了？
t_en: So, let's think about it this way. Aren't tickets used solely for getting into the venue... In other words, as long as I'm able to get you into the venue, wouldn't that just be like buying a ticket from me?

t_ch: 所以这个特别观赛渠道，指的就是任何不需要门票也能进入会场的方法。
t_en: So, this special viewing channel actually refers to any way that I can get you into the venue without using a ticket.
Isn't that just fare dodging?

t_ch: 不花钱看比赛才叫逃票，可我是收费的啊。既然你都花钱了，那就不能叫逃票。
t_en: Fare dodging is only if you watch the competition without paying. Since I charge a fee, and you've made payment, how can that be considered fare dodging?
What kinds of methods do you actually use?

t_ch: 这得因人而异，我会根据你的实际情况量身定制方案。
t_en: It differs from person to person. I'll customize a plan based on each client's situation.

t_ch: 如果你腿脚灵活，我会在检票的时候拼死抱住检票员，让你强冲安检。
t_en: For example, if you're nimble, then I'll hold onto the ticket inspector for dear life during the ticket inspection while you rush through the security check.

t_ch: 如果你善于表演，我会配合你的演出声泪俱下，让检票员于心不忍。
t_en: If you're a good performer, I'll put on a tear-jerking performance with you to tug at the heartstrings of the ticket inspector.

t_ch: 如果你体力又弱演技又差，那我也知道几处通风管道，你懂的……
t_en: However, if you're physically weak and also a bad performer, then I do know of a couple of ventilation ducts...

t_ch: 我们刚才聊的这些，此时此地，你知我知，千万别说出去了哦。
t_en: Regarding what we've just discussed, it's a secret between the both of us. Don't go around telling others about it.
I want to understand more about ways to make money.
Haha, I knew it!
Are your ways of making money legit?

t_ch: 你问我，我肯定说正经，问其他人的话…不一定。
t_en: If you ask me, I'll definitely say it's legit. But if you ask others, their opinions... might differ.

t_ch: 你不会是搞地下赌博的吧？
t_en: You can't possibly be taking underground bets, right?

t_ch: 嘘——我从不搞地下赌博。你看，这里是竞锋舰，这是天上赌博。
t_en: Shhh, I'll never touch underground betting. And look, this is the Skysplitter, so we're actually betting in the sky.

t_ch: 有句话叫「想发财的人的钱最好赚」，不知道你有没有听说过「演武<unbreak>123</unbreak>彩票」？其实背后的庄家就是我。
t_en: There's a saying that goes, "the money of those who dream of striking it rich are the easiest to earn." I wonder if you've heard of the "Martial Arts <unbreak>123</unbreak> Lottery"? I'm actually the house behind that.

t_ch: 你或许会问，赌局有输有赢，凭什么我能保证稳赚不赔？那是因为我有独门法宝——一只能预测未来的谛听。
t_en: Then, you might ask, since there are no guarantees in gambling, how do I ensure that I only win and don't incur losses? Well, that's all thanks to this unique treasure that I possess — a Diting who can predict the future.

t_ch: 这只谛听名叫「宝萝」，曾是太卜司符玄大人的宠物，由于终日陪伴在太卜左右，耳闻目染之下具备了预知未来的能力。
t_en: This Diting is called Baoluo. It used to be the pet of Lady Fu Xuan from the Divination Commission. As it was always by the master diviner's side, under her influence, it gained the ability to foretell the future as well.

t_ch: 后来符玄大人忌惮它取代自己，便将其赶出太卜司，几经周转来到我手里。
t_en: Afraid that she would be replaced by it, Lady Fu Xuan chased it out of the Divination Commission. I then eventually got my hands on it.

t_ch: 现在有了这只「宝萝」在手，无论是什么赌局，我从未输过。只要你愿意投入一定资本，与我联合做局，我保证你赚得盆满钵满。
t_en: Since getting Baoluo, I have never lost no matter what kind of gamble I partake in. So, as long as you're willing to invest some capital and join hands with me in the setup, I guarantee that you'll be raking in the profits soon enough.

t_ch: 我见你这人面善值得信任，换了别人我可是只字不提。这段时间地衡司查得严，你也别走漏了风声，等过了这段风头，咱俩一起赚大钱。
t_en: It's only because you seem like a kind and trustworthy person that I'm telling you this. If it were anyone else, I would have kept my mouth shut. Also, as the Realm-Keeping Commission has been quite strict about things as of late, remember to keep everything on the down-low. Once their investigation dies down, it'll be our time to shine.
I don't have any other questions.
See you. You can look for me any time you need something.
Not at the moment.
See you. You can look for me any time you need something.
C—Can you hit me?
(Whack lightly.)

t_ch: 有痛感？！这一切都是真的！
t_en: I feel pain!? It was all real!
(Whack violently.)

t_ch: 没让你打这么疼…不过，我确信了，这就是现实！
t_en: I didn't ask you to hit that hard... But now, I'm certain that it's real!
(Shake head in confusion.)

t_ch: 你下不了手你这人还怪好嘞。
t_en: You can't do it? What a nice person.

t_ch: 呜呜呜…你知道吗？我居然和彦卿大人拥抱了！还合了影！这合影就是我的传家宝了！
t_en: *sob*... Did you know? I actually hugged Master Yanqing! We even took a photo together! This photo is going to be my family heirloom!

t_ch: 可惜如果我能跑得再快一点就好了，说不定还能让彦卿大人给我签个名。
t_en: If only I ran a little faster, perhaps I could have even gotten Master Yanqing's autograph.
Congratulations, you succeeded in meeting your idol.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，虽然彦卿大人比合影里更迷你一点，但不妨碍他在我心中的高大形象。
t_en: Hehe, although Master Yanqing appears smaller than in the photo, it doesn't hinder his mighty image in my heart.

t_ch: 区区彦卿而已，手下败将。
t_en: It's just Yanqing, someone who I once defeated.

t_ch: 你这是什么话？我要求你立刻向彦卿大人道歉！
t_en: How dare you? Apologize to Master Yanqing immediately!
I apologize to Master Yanqing.
That's better.
Actually, I know Yanqing pretty well...

t_ch: 我才不信嘞，还有谁能比我更熟？
t_en: I don't believe you. Can anyone claim to know Master Yanqing better than me?

t_ch: 等一下，我现在要深呼吸，深、呼——吸——平复下激动的心情，好了。如果你想和我再聊聊彦卿大人，我倒是可以随时奉陪哦。
t_en: Hold on. Deep breaths — breathe in, breathe out — I need to calm myself down. Alright, look for me anytime you want to talk about Master Yanqing.

t_ch: 我们又见面了啊，这次是来加入「彦卿全银河粉丝后援会」的么？
t_en: We meet again. Are you here to join the Yanqing Galactic Fan Club?
I would like to ask you something.

t_ch: 是关于彦卿大人的么？我们来好好交流一番吧！
t_en: Is it concerning Master Yanqing? Then let's have a good chat about it!
You mentioned that you hugged Yanqing?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，其实方法很简单。所谓「天下武功，唯快不破」，追星也一样，只要跑得足够快就行。
t_en: Hehe, it's actually very simple. As the saying goes, "in the world of martial arts, speed is king." It's the same thing with chasing after your idol. All that matters is being fast enough.

t_ch: 我提前练了一个月的长跑和关节技，鞋都磨破了好几双，就是为了提升自己的速度和力量。
t_en: To raise my speed and strength, I trained so much in running and grappling techniques for a month that I even wore out several pairs of shoes.

t_ch: 那些负责安保的云骑根本追不上我，我一冲到台上就死死抱住彦卿大人，他们费了半天劲才把我们拉扯开。
t_en: Those Cloud Knights in charge of security could not even catch up to me. When I got onto the stage, I hugged Master Yanqing tightly, and it took quite a while before they managed to separate us.
The Cloud Knights did not lock you up?

t_ch: 彦卿大人让云骑不要为难我，所以云骑只对我进行了批评教育。
t_en: Master Yanqing instructed the Cloud Knights to not make things difficult for me, so they only severely reprimanded me.

t_ch: 彦卿大人真是一个关爱粉丝的优质偶像，啊…你就说谁会不喜欢他！
t_en: Master Yanqing is truly a top-class idol who cares about his fans. Ahh... Who wouldn't like him!?
Did you manage to talk to Yanqing?

t_ch: 嗐，别提了。本来我准备了一肚子的话，结果见到本人时全忘了。
t_en: *sigh* Let's not mention that. I prepared a long speech to say to him, but completely forgot everything when I met him.

t_ch: 据说我现在上了什么黑名单…真是搞笑，我根本不在乎好吧！
t_en: Apparently, I'm on some blacklist right now... What a joke. I don't care about that!

t_ch: 你到底喜欢彦卿哪点呢？
t_en: What exactly do you like about Yanqing?

t_ch: 因为他就是我心目中理想的自己！
t_en: Because he is the ideal that I've always aspired to become!

t_ch: 我从小的梦想就是成为一名天下无双的剑士，为仙舟斩除孽物，建立不世奇功。但我的资质平庸，剑术只练到入门水平，连云骑军的选拔考试都过不了……
t_en: Since young, I've dreamed of becoming an unparalleled swordmaster, eradicating abominations for the Xianzhou and accomplishing outstanding feats. However, due to my mediocre talent, my sword skills remained rudimentary, and I could not even pass the selection examination for the Cloud Knights...

t_ch: 但彦卿大人的出现，让我心中的火又燃了起来。相比我这样的普通人，他是剑术天才，我希望他能替我实现梦想。
t_en: However, the appearance of Master Yanqing reignited the spark within me. Compared to someone mediocre like me, he's a genius of the sword, and I hope that my dreams can be realized through him.

t_ch: 但彦卿大人就像是我梦想的映射——看着他努力的身影，我也感觉自己收获了一份力量。即便我没有天赋，但是我会一直学剑，总有一天成为彦卿大人那样的剑侠！
t_en: But watching Master Yanqing is like watching my dreams come to fruition. When I look at how hard he works, I feel like I've gained some strength too. Even without talent, I'll continue to pursue swordsmanship in hopes of one day becoming a swordmaster like Master Yanqing!

t_ch: 其实我也一直很支持彦卿。
t_en: Actually, I have always been supportive of Yanqing.

t_ch: 那请你务必要加入我们「彦卿全银河粉丝后援会」！
t_en: Then you must join our Yanqing Galactic Fan Club!
Fan club?

t_ch: 后援会是基于「更好地支持彦卿大人」这一宗旨创建的粉丝群体。
t_en: The fan club is a group created by fans to better support Master Yanqing.
Galactic?

t_ch: 怎么了吗？我们就在银河之中，这不符合「全银河」的定义吗？
t_en: What's wrong? We're among the cosmos. Does this not fit the definition of "Pan-Cosmos"?

t_ch: 我们会定期举办各种应援活动。我们会穿统一的应援服，喊统一的应援口号，另外还有一些宣传推广、粉丝聚会、同人创作之类的活动……
t_en: We periodically organize fan events where we wear the same fan outfits and shout fan slogans together. We also hold publicity and promotional events, fan gatherings, and fan work creation events...

t_ch: 你要是感兴趣的话，我们可以深入交流一下。
t_en: You can talk about this in-depth if you're interested to find out more.
That's all that I wanted to ask.

t_ch: 那好，「彦卿全银河粉丝后援会」随时等待你的加入。
t_en: Alright, you're always welcome to join the Yanqing Galactic Fan Club.

t_ch: 今天暂时没有想聊的了。
t_en: I don't have anything to talk about today.

t_ch: 那好，记得「彦卿全银河粉丝后援会」随时等待你的加入。
t_en: Alright, remember that you're always welcome to join the Yanqing Galactic Fan Club.
Today's, starskiff, is too fast...
Hang on, have you got motion sickness?
Please hold me, I'm gonna, vomit...
...Ah, hold it in.
I'll, try, my best.
I'll always wait for you...
Thank you, my dear...
Darling, I love you...
I love you, dear...

t_ch: 从天上往下瞧，这星槎海…？
t_en: Looking down from here, is this the Starskiff Haven...?
It's like our hometown... That... Water thing...
The dam?
That's not what I said.
Isn't that what you mean?

t_ch: 配合巡逻的机巧都坏了…
t_en: Every piece of machinery assigned to cooperate with the patrols went out of order...
If you keep loafing about...

t_ch: 我会罚你们配合地衡司去…
t_en: I'll send you to cooperate with the Realm-Keeping Commission...

t_ch: 不要啊！我不要去通下水道…
t_en: No! I don't want to go clean the sewers...
Hey, I just got to the Luofu...

t_ch: 街上都是军队，我好害怕…
t_en: This place is packed with soldiers. It's scary...
Don't be scared. Everything will be fine...
C'mon, take a deep breath...

t_ch: 喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！这位{F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}，要来瓶匹诺康尼原装进口苏乐达么，边看比赛边喝，快乐加倍哦！
t_en: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, and make your dreams a blast! That {F#lady}{M#gentleman} over there, would you like a bottle of authentic SoulGlad imported directly from Penacony? Multiply your happiness with some SoulGlad as you watch the competition!

t_ch: 在畅饮活动期间购买苏乐达，还能参加「开盖有奖」活动，丰富的奖品等着你拿！
t_en: During the Drink Up event period, participate in the Uncap and Win event when you purchase SoulGlad. Many exciting rewards are up for grabs!
Is your SoulGlad authentic?

t_ch: 当然正宗啦，苏乐达™在竞锋舰开设官方旗舰店的目的，就是为了让每位观众都能喝到原汁原味的苏乐达。
t_en: Of course it's authentic! The reason SoulGlad™ set up an official flagship store on Skysplitter is to ensure that the audience gets to enjoy the most authentic SoulGlad.
Are you sure the Uncap and Win event is not a scam?

t_ch: {F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}请放心，本次抽奖活动全程受地衡司监督，所有奖品的获奖概率都有公示。
t_en: Rest assured, {F#miss}{M#mister}. The prize draw is supervised by the Realm-Keeping Commission and all the prize probabilities have been clearly stated in public.

t_ch: 我倒要听听，能有什么奖品。
t_en: I gotta know what kinds of prizes you can offer.

t_ch: 奖品太多啦。比如再来一瓶、知更鸟小姐演唱会门票、匹诺康尼豪华旅游套餐，甚至还有苏乐达一年免费畅饮权！
t_en: There are so many! One More Bottle, Miss Robin's concert tickets, Penacony luxury travel packages, and even a year's free supply of SoulGlad!

t_ch: 这里不仅有经典苏乐达，还有针对仙舟人口味定制的好梦气泡饮…不过，我更推荐你购买经典口味，好梦气泡饮…并不能提供极致的快乐体验。
t_en: Here, besides Classic SoulGlad, we also have the Sweet Dreams Soda flavor made exclusively for the Xianzhou folk's tastes... However, I still recommend the classic flavor. Sweet Dreams Soda... cannot provide the ultimate experience of happiness.

t_ch: {F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}你看在我这么卖力介绍的份上，买一瓶苏乐达好不好？
t_en: So, {F#miss}{M#mister}, how about a bottle of SoulGlad? Promoting products is hard work, you know!
I'm actually cutting down on sugar these days.

t_ch: 好吧…或许应该推出一款无糖版苏乐达。为了销量…啊，不对，是为了健康！
t_en: Oh... Maybe we should consider releasing a zero sugar version of SoulGlad. Sales... Uh, health matters, after all!
I'll take one right now!

t_ch: 太好了。希望您别嫌我啰嗦，苏乐达这样的好饮料本来也不需要费劲推销的。
t_en: Great! I know I'm starting to sound like a broken record, but beverages as good as SoulGlad? They don't even need promoters — the taste is enough to speak for itself!
I prefer Immortal's Delight.

t_ch: 啊？！恕我直言，仙人快乐茶毁掉了仙舟人的味觉，是真正的业界毒瘤。
t_en: Huh? No offense, but Immortal's Delight is the reason why Xianzhou folks can't tell yummy from yucky anymore. That beverage is the scourge of the industry, if you ask me.

t_ch: {F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}想喝苏乐达的话，可以找我打声招呼。
t_en: Well, if you ever feel like a bottle of SoulGlad, just let me know, {F#miss}{M#mister}!

t_ch: {F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}又见面了，这次是来买苏乐达的么？
t_en: We meet again, {F#miss}{M#mister}! Up for a bottle of SoulGlad today?
Can we chat?

t_ch: 反正现在没有顾客，我陪你聊聊吧。
t_en: Sure, I'm not looking after a customer anyway.

t_ch: 苏乐达在仙舟卖的好么？
t_en: Is SoulGlad selling well in Xianzhou?

t_ch: 不怎么好卖，仙舟饮料市场的水太深了。
t_en: Not exactly. It's not that easy to penetrate the beverage market here.

t_ch: 一来仙舟当地人对饮品的口味十分挑剔，外来饮品通常需要做一些本地口味调整，好梦气泡饮对于口味太过于妥协，我觉得那并不算是苏乐达。
t_en: For one thing, the locals are highly particular about how their beverages taste. More often than not, beverages from other worlds have to be adapted to cater to the dietary preferences of the Xianzhou people. Sweet Dreams Soda has compromised too much on the flavor — I feel that you can't really call it "SoulGlad" anymore.

t_ch: 二来仙舟本土的饮料品牌历史悠久，而且价格便宜。日常饮料嘛，谁也不想在这上面花太多的钱，不是吗？
t_en: For another, the local beverage brands are all established with long histories, and they're even inexpensive to boot. People aren't willing to splurge much on beverages that they consume on a regular basis.

t_ch: 你去把价格打下来，薄利多销。
t_en: Slash the prices. Go for low profit but high sales.
A price war? Are you sure that would work?

t_ch: 价格确实是我们的一大劣势——高浓度糖浆、忆质、星际运输的运费，甚至还包含天舶司收取的关税。咱们成本比仙舟本土饮料贵多了。
t_en: It's true that our prices don't work to our benefit. High-concentration syrup, memoria, cross-galactic freight costs, and even Sky-Faring Commission's import duties... Our production costs are much higher than those of local Xianzhou beverages.

t_ch: 不过苏乐达™正在计划强势入住仙舟本地，要是我们在这里建厂的话，贸易的天平就会向我们倾斜。
t_en: However, SoulGlad™ is planning to heavily invest in the Xianzhou local market. If we set up a factory here, the scales of commerce will definitely start to tip in our favor.

t_ch: 要不你们试着改变下营销策略？
t_en: Try changing your marketing strategy?

t_ch: 我也是这么想的，我打算邀请仙舟本土的大明星做代言。对了，你喜欢怎样的明星代言呢？
t_en: My thoughts exactly. I'm planning to invite a Xianzhou local celeb as our brand ambassador. What kind of celebrity do you think will make a good fit?

t_ch: 找大博主桂乃芬的话，估计会获得很多年轻人的关注吧？
t_en: A popular influencer like Guinaifen will get plenty of attention from youths, I reckon.

t_ch: 不过，来竞锋舰的观众可能对彦卿大人更感兴趣，我们广告词都想好了，就叫「与苏乐达™一起，霜刃一试」。
t_en: But visitors to the Skysplitter are likely to find Master Yanqing more interesting. We even have the campaign slogan ready: "Chill out with the Frosty Blade. Chill out with a SoulGlad™."

t_ch: 不过就眼下来看，我还有很大的销售压力啊……
t_en: But for now... Things aren't looking too good on the sales front.

t_ch: 你好像不推荐好梦气泡饮？
t_en: You don't seem to be promoting Sweet Dreams Soda at all.

t_ch: 好梦气泡饮就…嗯，按照我的标准来说，不算是苏乐达。
t_en: Mm... I'll put it this way: Sweet Dreams Soda isn't SoulGlad in my book.

t_ch: 它降低了糖浆含量也就算了，还增加了仙舟当地的草药成分，你说这种不伦不类的口味是什么都可以，怎么可能还是苏乐达？
t_en: Not only does its recipe call for reduced syrup levels, but it even includes local Xianzhou herbs as ingredients. Call the mishmash of flavors what you want, but it's not SoulGlad.

t_ch: 苏乐达之所以能够风靡银河，就是因为它能提供独一无二的口味，现在给它加了乱七八糟的口味，岂不是丢掉了核心竞争力，说真的，我不理解。
t_en: SoulGlad owes its universe-spanning popularity to its one-of-a-kind flavor. By messing up its flavor profile with random additions, it's no different from forsaking what makes SoulGlad sell in the first place. The notion absolutely boggles my mind.

t_ch: 你为什么来仙舟卖苏乐达？
t_en: Why are you selling SoulGlad in the Xianzhou?
Boss' orders.

t_ch: 好吧，我知道你觉得这种说法很敷衍，但是我也不能骗你，说什么我是为了热爱苏乐达文化，所以想让它走进千家万户里。
t_en: I know, I know... It's a disappointing answer. I could spin a grand story about how much I love SoulGlad's culture and how I dream of it becoming a beverage that everybody in the cosmos knows and loves, but I don't want to lie.

t_ch: 领导说我是匹诺康尼的销冠，所谓「能力越大，责任越大」，我应该去做这种具有开拓精神的工作。领导用一块「大饼」将我塞上了前往仙舟的飞船。
t_en: According to my boss, I'm the top salesperson in Penacony, and thus the one "most suitable" for trailblazing a path to a new market. "To whom much is given, much is required," or something like that... A ton of empty promises later, the next thing I know, I'd been thrown onto an airship bound for Xianzhou.
I don't have any more questions.

t_ch: 想喝苏乐达的话，可以来这里找我。
t_en: Well, if you ever feel like a bottle of SoulGlad, you know where to find me.

t_ch: 今天暂时没有想聊的了。
t_en: I don't have anything to talk about today.

t_ch: 想喝苏乐达的话，可以来这里找我。
t_en: Well, if you ever feel like a bottle of SoulGlad, you know where to find me.
Would be nice to have some SoulGlad right now...

t_ch: 想喝苏乐达的话，可以来这里找我。
t_en: Well, if you ever feel like a bottle of SoulGlad, you know where to find me.
Shipping data...
No problem.
Starskiff dynamic supervisor...
Hm, I think there's a problem...
How long have we been together?
Three hundred... No, four hundred years...
Specifically?
Uh... four hundred and twenty years?
You forgot!? I want to break up!
Heron Express — We Mail Anything.
Heron Express, any-any-any-any-any...
This thing is broken...
Any-any-any-any-any...
I think this ad is out-of-date...
Got any bright new ideas?
Since it's here, I'd better mail it!
It's loud, but not elegant enough.
That's it. I have to mail it!
It's elegant, but not loud enough.
Why don't you try shortening it?
Shortening it... Okay!
Mail it now!
Great, that'll go viral.
Mail it now! Mail it now!
How are things going at the moment?
I'm not very optimistic...
Madam Yukong is tweaking it.
That must've been a hassle for her...

t_ch: 曾经的星际大盗躲在这？
t_en: Is the old space bandit hiding here?

t_ch: 躲在这浥尘客栈做跑堂？
t_en: Masquerading at the Petrichor Inn as a waiter?
Didn't I catch that guy already?
Things really are getting weird these days.
My money was gone before I even entered the store.

t_ch: 地衡司公廨又该怎么走…
t_en: How to get to the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery...
My mom used to work here.
Really?
Back then, it wasn't called the Petrichor Inn.
Travelers with nowhere else to go!
Take shelter from the elements in the inn!
Don't worry. It's completely free!
What did you register this one as?
Isn't that a freight starskiff?
I just got back from there.
This is a towing skiff for the harbor!
You wrote down what needs towing away!
There're lots of visitors at the Palace of Astrum these days...
Trading is nothing more than people coming and going...
We should keep our eyes peeled...
Look out for people with ulterior motives...
My head hurts. I want to knock off work...

t_ch: 你刚来的时候不是这样的。
t_en: It wasn't like this when you first came.

t_ch: 我那时才一百岁开外，不懂事…
t_en: I was barely a hundred years old back then. I didn't know anything...
How time flies...
Idlers, please go home as soon as you can.
Abide by the curfew, and overcome tough times together.
This crosstalk has four lessons in it...
Which four lessons?
Eat. Lots. Then. Sleep!
Shut your pie hole!
From inside the pilothouse came the General's battle cry~
A cry so fearsome, even the comet went astern~
What should I sing next?
Master, I'm nervous.
Singing in public...
This is what any theater troupe performer needs to go through.
Once you accepted your weaknesses...
Then you're ready for the stage!
Master, the streets are all empty...
Let's go back soon...
No!
The best way to conquer fear...
(Trembling) Boohoo, I'm shaking with fear...
Is to stare down that fear!
A Xianzhou specialty!
Come and see!
Freshly grilled berrypheasant skewers.
Songlotus cake!
Mommy, I want everything.
You can only get one, dear.
Which one should I get...
Mommy, I can't choose...
Then you shall get nothing.
What a raucous bunch.
They're the noisy ones.
I have nothing.
Everyone's gone home. It's time to pack up...
If the disaster never ends...
I can't even open up the shop...
...What are you doing here?
Have you come to slack off?
Forget it. I'm snowed under with work.
That's it then. Looks like we'll...
Wei told me that we need to go through a back door...

t_ch: 你傻啊！不是让你真来后门…
t_en: Idiot! He doesn't mean a literal door in the back alley...
Please don't linger around here...
Society must be protected during special times...
Ma'am, won't you buy some of this fruit?
Is your fruit sweet?
Of course it is!
Wanna have some?
I do, but I don't have any money.
Then here, have a little taste...
Remember to bring your wallet next time.
Thank you very much, ma'am!
That's expensive...
That's cheap...
What should I buy...
Let's go home...

t_ch: 说书这东西，过时的艺术…
t_en: Minstrelsy, now that's a dated art form...
It'll always have its fans. Who are you to mock it?
High-Cloud Quintet...
Good tea. This is good tea!
Why are the streets empty?
Who cares. Just drink more tea!
This Auspicious XV...
Doesn't it feel just like the XIV?
So what?
Are you trying to give me an old model?
Should I buy it, or not?
These market conditions aren't fair...
...Let's go home soon.
Where are you from?
The Herta Space Station...
Where have you come from?
A thriving mining planet...
I really am a foxian!
Where are your ears?
I caught a rare disease and they fell off...
What about your tail then?
I caught a rare disease and it fell off...
This is a Class-B license...
But I want to pilot a mega-starskiff...
That requires a Class-A license...
I don't care. I wanna pilot a mega one!
What should we call the new starskiff models?

t_ch: 昭昭日月明，离离星辰行。
t_en: Brilliant Moonlight, Luxuriant Orbit.
Sounds nice, lemme think about it...
What does one do for fun on the Luofu?
Oh, there're loads...
Why not take a stroll along Starwatcher Avenue?
Great, sounds pretty sweet.
Take care and stay safe along the way.
I'll bring back some local specialties!
What do they have there?
Um... does a Nosewalker count?
Cool, I've been wanting one of those for ages!
Madam Yukong is so graceful...
Madam Yukong is so chic...
Madam Yukong is so cool...
Madam Yukong is so gentle...
Business hasn't been well these days...
Everyone's going on about the Antimatter Legion...
I hope it doesn't impact any trade routes...

t_ch: 唉，我重仓了公司的股票。
t_en: Drat, I stocked up on IPC's shares.
I'm here to license your starskiff...
What model is it?
Stagplains Lioncub.
Is that a new model?
It's an old warship...
Its capacity will take a hit.
Evacuate the people to another dock.
That's all we can do.
There are still some people held up...
Cloud Knights, please assist...
Yes sir.
Stay calm and let's wait for the news...
